name: Helion He3 Tokamak Fusion Reactor
description: The Helion He3 Tokamak is a first-generation aneutronic fusion reactor harnessing Helium-3 deuterium reactions in a toroidal magnetic confinement chamber. At 100 million degrees core temperature and 1.2 GW thermal output, it represents the pinnacle of human energy engineering. Its construction marks a civilizational milestone — mastery over fusion power in deep space.
